entries.area_of_concern: Launcher serves old backend binary after Go source rebuild

hits.prompt_excerpt: why is /api/health returning the old version string after I rebuilt the launcher
hits.chain_of_events: edit cmd/launcher/main.go → build OK → curl returns OLD version → repeat 4× → realise SIGTERM stall
SIGTERM sent → launcher hung → manual SIGKILL needed → restart succeeded

hits.prompt_excerpt: backend on staging shows old behaviour after deploy
hits.chain_of_events: deploy script ran → process kept serving → diagnosed as stale binary

entries.area_of_concern: Launcher doc lags behind supervisor refactors

hits.prompt_excerpt: follow the steps in c_launcher.md and tell me what happens
hits.chain_of_events: doc steps → command not found → realised refactor moved binary path
